details: 2024/25 electric-assist fleet. TEAL frame with white 'CapMetro' wordmark. Purple-to-blue starfield skirt-guards over both wheels (accent). White/cream rims, black saddle, mid-drive motor. No cargo basket. (Corrects earlier silver guess.)
CURRENT electric fleet: white/light-grey frame with bright GREEN fork, wheel rims and chainguard. 'oo' logo in green. Grey saddle. No front basket. (Older all-blue Bergen bike is retired.)
Azure frame, 'BLUEbikes' white wordmark. Black wire front basket with blue diamond-pattern panel. Blue 'MASSACHUSETTS' + blue-cross skirt-guard with orange accents. White/cream rims.
Ocean/royal-blue frame with lime-green 'CHATTANOOGA' wordmark and bright lime rear skirt-guard. Black wire front basket, black saddle, silver crank.

Updated Divvy classic bike (official render). Bright sky-blue frame + fork. Black BOX front carrier with a light-blue Lyft screen panel. Blue 'lyft' rear skirt-guard, Chicago-flag stars on the down tube, 'DIVVY' black wordmark. White/cream rims, silver crank.

Gloss-black frame. 'CoGo' logo ('Co' white, 'Go' red #e23b34), 'COLUMBUS' white downtube. THIS unit has a minimal tubular front rack (no wire basket). Teal-green 'Medical Mutual' rear skirt. Silver rims.

2022 fleet (official render). Black frame. Black HSBC cargo box/bag up front (front carrier). Silver-grey rear skirt-guard with HSBC red hexagon; Ecobici green logo (#7ab800) + Metrobus 'm'. White/cream rims, yellow spoke reflectors.
White frame with bright GREEN wheel rims and green circle logo ('Ddareungi'). Silver wire front basket, black saddle.
White frame with yellow-orange rear skirt-guard and orange chainguard disc. Green 'YouBike' logo. Black wire front basket, white/cream rims.
Matte-black frame. Green rear skirt-guard with a bicycle pattern + 'BIKE SHARE TORONTO' roundel (also on the head tube). Black tubular front rack, black fenders, silver rims and crank.
Red frame with yellow/gold 'capital bikeshare' wordmark + Arlington 'd*' mark. Black tubular front rack, black fenders (no colored skirt panel), silver rims and crank.
Tashu: lime-green frame, silver wire front basket, red-accented fenders. NOT in the skirt sketch -> skirt type defaulted to halfDisc.
MiBici: silver frame with green front section; green-and-yellow star-patterned skirt panels; black wire front basket.
Alepa Fillari: bright yellow frame + front/rear branded panels, red 'alepa' logo.
Citi Bike (same bike as New York City): blue frame, front rack, 'citi bike' branding.
Citi Bike: blue frame, front rack. Shares its image/bike with Jersey City.
Oslo Bysykkel: blue frame with white curved skirt panels (Urban Sharing platform, sibling to Bergen/Trondheim). White electric variant also exists.
Santander Cycles ('Boris bikes'): dark-grey frame with red 'Santander' skirt panels, front rack.
Metro Bike Share: black frame with lime-green 'M' panels front + rear.
BIXI: red frame, black saddle, front rack.
Indego: blue frame, blue front box carrier ('Indego' logo), 'Independence' rear panel.
POGOH: dark navy-teal frame with yellow accents, front rack, e-assist.
Mi Bici Tu Bici: green frame, black wire front basket. Fleet also comes in orange and cyan; green shown here.
Bay Wheels (Lyft e-bike): silver frame, pink-purple gradient skirt, black wire basket, cream rims. NOT in the skirt sketch -> skirt type defaulted to halfDisc.
Trondheim Bysykkel: white frame with red rims and red skirt (Urban Sharing platform, sibling to Oslo/Bergen). Watermarked station shot -> medium confidence.
Mobi by Rogers: light-grey frame, red front basket + red accents, e-assist.
